meta.description: Synthetic feedback signals for SignalBox theme exploration. These are demo data derived from fictional customer research scenarios.

themes.label: Workflow Automation
themes.description: Signals about automating repetitive tasks, scheduling recurring operations, and reducing manual overhead in day-to-day workflows.

themes.label: Mobile Usability
themes.description: Feedback on mobile experience gaps — density of information on small screens, touch interactions, and on-the-go decision making.

themes.label: Data Governance & Permissions
themes.description: Concerns around sharing confidence, permission transparency, and ensuring sensitive data stays protected during collaboration.

themes.label: Onboarding & Setup
themes.description: Pain points in first-run experiences, initial configuration complexity, and time-to-value for new users and teams.

themes.label: Performance & Reliability
themes.description: Issues with load times, API timeouts, data sync delays, and system reliability under normal and peak usage.

themes.label: Integration Ecosystem
themes.description: Requests for third-party connectors, API extensibility, webhook support, and interoperability with existing toolchains.

signals.title: Admins need scheduled exports for recurring reviews
signals.description: A fictional operations admin described rebuilding the same export every week before leadership review. The core need is a recurring delivery flow with clear ownership and failure visibility.

signals.title: Field managers need faster mobile triage
signals.description: A fictional district manager said alert detail pages are useful on desktop but too dense during store visits. They want a compact mobile summary that highlights severity, affected locations, and the next best action.

signals.title: Analysts need clearer permission boundaries
signals.description: A fictional analytics lead hesitated to share dashboards because the UI did not clearly explain which sensitive fields were excluded for external reviewers. The theme is confidence-building around governed collaboration.

signals.title: Procurement team blocked by slow initial setup
signals.description: Prospect's IT team estimated 3 weeks to configure SSO and role mappings. They need a guided wizard that reduces setup from weeks to hours, with clear progress indicators and rollback options.

signals.title: Dashboard timeouts during month-end reporting
signals.description: Multiple users reported 30-second load times and occasional gateway timeouts when running aggregate queries across all business units during month-end close. Affects executive visibility into financials.

signals.title: Need Salesforce integration for patient outreach tracking
signals.description: Clinical ops team manually exports engagement data to upload into Salesforce campaigns. They need a native connector or webhook that syncs patient touchpoints in near real-time.

signals.title: Approval chains block time-sensitive reports
signals.description: Reports that require manager sign-off before distribution often miss their deadline. The team wants conditional auto-approval for recurring reports that haven't changed scope.

signals.title: Push notifications dismissed too easily on mobile
signals.description: Store managers reported that critical alerts are visually identical to informational ones. They swipe-dismiss high-priority alerts because there's no visual urgency differentiation on the lock screen.

signals.title: External partners confused by permission error messages
signals.description: Partner reviewers see generic 'Access Denied' screens with no explanation of what they lack access to or who to contact. They need contextual guidance that preserves security while reducing friction.

signals.title: New team members take too long to become productive
signals.description: Engineering managers say it takes 2-3 weeks for new hires to navigate the system confidently. They want role-based onboarding paths with interactive tutorials rather than static documentation.

signals.title: Real-time data sync drops events under high load
signals.description: During market open hours, the event stream occasionally drops updates, causing stale portfolio values. They need guaranteed delivery or at minimum a visible staleness indicator.

signals.title: Must integrate with ServiceNow for IT ticket routing
signals.description: Prospect requires alerts to automatically create ServiceNow incidents with proper categorization. Without this integration, their compliance team won't approve the vendor.

signals.title: Bulk user provisioning needs CSV import
signals.description: IT admin has 200+ users to onboard and the current one-by-one flow is untenable. They need batch import with validation preview and error handling.

signals.title: API rate limits too restrictive for ETL pipelines
signals.description: Their data engineering team hits rate limits during nightly batch syncs. Current limits of 100 req/min are insufficient for their 50K-record nightly ETL job.

signals.title: Mobile app crashes when offline then reconnecting
signals.description: Clinicians in areas with spotty WiFi lose unsaved form data when the app crashes on network transition. They need offline-capable data entry with background sync.

signals.title: Sharing a dashboard should show a permission preview
signals.description: Before sharing, users want to see exactly what the recipient will see — including which widgets will be hidden and which data will be masked. Current share dialog gives no preview.

signals.title: Need webhook notifications for compliance audit trail
signals.description: Compliance team requires real-time webhook callbacks whenever sensitive data is accessed or exported. This is a hard requirement for their SOC 2 audit.

signals.title: Automated alert escalation when no action taken
signals.description: If a critical alert isn't acknowledged within 15 minutes, it should auto-escalate to the next person in the chain. Current system only sends one notification with no follow-up.
